simple_types.name: sfSocketStatus
simple_types.code:
type sfSocketStatus is
  (sfSocketDone,
   sfSocketNotReady,
   sfSocketPartial,
   sfSocketDisconnected
   sfSocketError
  );

enumeration_literals.name: sfSocketDone
enumeration_literals.description: /< The socket has sent / received the data

enumeration_literals.name: sfSocketNotReady
enumeration_literals.description: /< The socket is not ready to send / receive data yet

enumeration_literals.name: sfSocketPartial
enumeration_literals.description: /< The socket sent a part of the data

enumeration_literals.name: sfSocketDisconnected
enumeration_literals.description: /< The TCP socket has been disconnected
